## Type of change

- [ ] Fetcher fix (chess.com API change, pagination, rate limiting)
- [ ] Analyzer fix (Stockfish handling, move classification, phase/time-trouble logic)
- [ ] New skill or new analysis capability
- [ ] Documentation / README
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] `uvx ruff check .` passes locally
- [ ] `uvx ruff format --check .` passes locally
- [ ] If I added a skill, the `SKILL.md` has `name` and `description` frontmatter
- [ ] I tested the affected script with `uv run`
- [ ] No personal data (chess.com usernames, game archives) committed
